title: Western Blot and Phos-tag Gels Protocol
author: Chuyu Chen
materials: Incubate the membranes with primary antibodies specific for LRRK2/Dardarin cloneN137/6 (1:1000, NeuroMab), LRRK2/Dardarin clone N241A/34 (1:1000, NeuroMab), Th (1:1000, Millipore), Rab3a (1:1000, Sigma), Rab3c (1:1000, Proteintech), synaptophysin (1:1000, Cell Signaling), Vmat2 (1:1000, R&D Systems), Snap25 (1:1000, Proteintech), DAT (1:1000, Millipore), pS1292 LRRK2 (1:100, Abcam), pS935 LRRK2 (1:100, Abcam), Rim1 (1:1000, Proteintech), GDI1 (1:1000, Sigma), GDI2 (1:1000, Novus), phospho-Rab12 (1:1000, Abcam), total Rab12 (1:1000, Proteintech), and β-actin (1:3000, Sigma) overnight at 4°C.

Homogenize tissue in 1x cell lysis buffer (Cell Signaling Technologies) supplemented with the 1x Halt protease and phosphatase inhibitor cocktail (Thermo Fisher Scientific) usingpellet pestles for 30 seconds
Determine protein concentration using BCA Protein Assays (Thermo Scientific).
Separated equal amounts of protein (30ug) by 4–12% NuPAGE Bis-Tris PAGE (Invitrogen)
Use BCA Protein Assays (Thermo Scientific) to determine protein concentration
Homogenize SNc tissues in EDTA-free Lysis bufferusing pellet pestles (30 seconds), supplement with Halt protease and phosphatase inhibitor cocktail (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
Chemiluminescent blots were imaged using the iBright imaging system (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
homogenizing buffer recipe ( 4mM HEPES, 320mM Sucrose and Halt protease supplemented with phosphatase inhibitor cocktail (Thermo Fisher Scientific))
separate equal amounts of protein (5ug) by 4–12% NuPAGE Bis-Tris PAGE (Invitrogen)

steps.title: Homogenize mouse striata in 1ml iced-cold...
steps.instruction: Homogenize mouse striata in 1ml iced-cold homogenizing buffer using a Teflon homogenizer (15 strokes).

steps.title: Centrifuge at 1000 g for 10 min at 4℃
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 1000 g for 10 min at 4℃.

steps.title: Remove supernatant (S2) Re-homogenize the pellet...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant (S2) Re-homogenize the pellet (P2) in 1 ml homogenizing buffer with 10 strokes in a Teflon homogenizer.

steps.title: Add P2 homogenate to the top...
steps.instruction: Add P2 homogenate to the top of a sucrose gradient made of 5ml 1.2M sucrose and 5ml 0.8M sucrose, and centrifuge at 69,150 g (SW41) for 70 min at 4°C.

steps.title: The synaptic plasma membrane fraction (SPM)...
steps.instruction: The synaptic plasma membrane fraction (SPM) in the interphase between two sucrose fractions is collected using a syringe and transfer to clean ultracentrifuge tubes

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet with SDS lysis...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet with SDS lysis buffer (1% SDS, 10mM EDTA, 50mM Tris) supplemented with the Halt protease and phosphatase inhibitor cocktail (Thermo Fisher Scientific)

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13800 g for 10 min at 4℃
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13800 g for 10 min at 4℃. Keep the supernatant.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13800 g for 10 min at 4℃
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13800 g for 10 min at 4℃. Keep the supernatant.

steps.title: Separate 10 μg of lysa teby 12
steps.instruction: Separate 10 μg of lysa teby 12.5% SuperSep TM Phos-tag TM (Wako).

steps.title: Wash gels with 1x TG transfer...
steps.instruction: Wash gels with 1x TG transfer buffer (Fisher BioReagents) supplemented with 10 % Methanol and 10 mM EDTA, 10 minutes x 3

steps.title: Incubate gels with 1x TG transfer...
steps.instruction: Incubate gels with 1x TG transfer buffer with 10% Methanol for 10 minutes

steps.title: Transfer gels to Nitrocellulose membranes (Thermo...
steps.instruction: Transfer gels to Nitrocellulose membranes (Thermo Scientific) using the Mini Gel Tank and Blot Module (ThermoFisher) at 15V for 3 hours

steps.title: Incubate the membranes in 3% BSA...
steps.instruction: Incubate the membranes in 3% BSA in 1x Tris buffered saline (Sigma) supplemented with 0.1% Tween 20 for 1 hour

steps.title: Incubate the membranes with secondary anti-mouse...
steps.instruction: Incubate the membranes with secondary anti-mouse or anti-rabbit antibodies (1:2000, Thermo Scientific) for 1 hour at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash membranes with TBS/Tween-20, 10 mins x3
steps.instruction: Wash membranes with TBS/Tween-20, 10 mins x3

steps.title: Wash membranes with TBS/Tween-20, 10 mins x3
steps.instruction: Wash membranes with TBS/Tween-20, 10 mins x3

steps.title: Incubate the membranes with Immobilon ECL...
steps.instruction: Incubate the membranes with Immobilon ECL Ultra Western HRP Substrate (Millipore) for 3 minutes RT

steps.title: Transfer to membranes using the iBlot...
steps.instruction: Transfer to membranes using the iBlot nitrocellulose membrane blotting system (Invitrogen) according to the manufacturer's protocol

steps.title: Centrifuge supernatant (S1) at 12,500 g...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge supernatant (S1) at 12,500 g for 15 min at 4°C.

steps.title: centrifuge in a swinging bucket rotor...
steps.instruction: centrifuge in a swinging bucket rotor (SW55) at 200,000 g for 30 min at 4°C.

steps.title: Transfer to membranes using the iBlot...
steps.instruction: Transfer to membranes using the iBlot nitrocellulose membrane blotting system (Invitrogen) according to the manufacturer's protocol

steps.title: EDTA-free Lysis buffer recipe (1% Triton...
steps.instruction: EDTA-free Lysis buffer recipe (1% Triton X-100, 1% glycerol, 150 mM NaCl, 25 mM HEPES, 1.5 mM MgCl 2 )
